title: Rich Malaysian Chicken Wrap
description: A nutty and tender Malaysian dish featuring harissa spice, perfect for a brunch mood, wrapped in a corn husk wrap, with a mediterranean-friendly twist
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together harissa spice, plain yogurt, salt, and 1 tablespoon of peanut oil
Add the chicken breast strips to the bowl and mix well to coat
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through
Warm the corn husk wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds
Assemble the wraps by slicing the grilled chicken and adding it to the corn husk wrap, along with chopped cucumber, carrots, and cilantro
Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of peanut oil over the top of each wrap
